mapper.insert: insert into appuser (APP_USER_ID ,EMAIL , PASSWORD , MBTI_TYPE_ID , CREATED_AT , UFILE , MOBILE, NICKNAME , PROVIDER , PROVIDER_ID) values (appuser_seq.nextval, #{email} , #{password}, #{mbtiTypeId}, sysdate , #{ufile} , #{mobile} , #{nickname} , #{provider}, #{providerId})
mapper.select: select count(*) from appuser where email=#{email}
mapper.insert: insert into authorities ( AUTH_ID , EMAIL, AUTH) values ( authorities_seq.nextval , #{email} , #{auth})
